---
title: Investigating the zonal wind response to SST warming using transient ensemble
  AGCM experiments
pagetitle: 2017-1-1-Palipane2016 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2017
author: Erool Palipane, Jian Lu, Paul Staten, Gang Chen and Edwin K. Schneider
venue: Climate Dynamics
venue_cit: <i>Climate Dynamics</i>, 48, 523--540, doi:10.1007/s00382-016-3092-9.
recommended_citation: 'Erool Palipane, Jian Lu, Paul Staten, Gang Chen and Edwin K.
  Schneider, 2017: Investigating the zonal wind response to SST warming using transient
  ensemble AGCM experiments, <i>Climate Dynamics</i>, 48, 523--540, doi:10.1007/s00382-016-3092-9.'
paper_url: http://link.springer.com/10.1007/s00382-016-3092-9
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Investigating the zonal wind response to SST warming using transient ensemble AGCM experiments

*Published in Climate Dynamics, 2017*

**Recommended citation:** Erool Palipane, Jian Lu, Paul Staten, Gang Chen and Edwin K. Schneider, 2017: Investigating the zonal wind response to SST warming using transient ensemble AGCM experiments, <i>Climate Dynamics</i>, 48, 523--540, doi:10.1007/s00382-016-3092-9.

[Download paper](http://link.springer.com/10.1007/s00382-016-3092-9){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
